subject: Port preshuffle GEMM kernel to CDNA4 MFMA(16,16,32)
description:
Update /app/04-preshuffle_gemm.py to use CDNA4 MFMA atom with all necessary tiling changes:
1. MFMA atom: (16,16,16) -> (16,16,32)
2. K permutation tile: (4,4,2):(1,8,4) -> (8,4,2):(1,16,8) 
3. preshuffle_layout_B: update shape and strides for K=32 atom
4. Inner loop: BLOCK_K//32 -> BLOCK_K//64
5. shuffle_weight call: layout=(16,16) -> (16,32)
6. Scheduler hints: adjust for fewer MFMA ops per stage
